title: User Signup and Email Verification Flow
interaction_flow: Client → SignupRouter: POST /signup { username, email, password, is_temp, referral_code, send_confirmation_code }
SignupRouter → EdgeRateLimitService: check('signup') → 429 if rate-limited
SignupRouter → AuthAuditService: record({ action: 'signup:real' | 'signup:temp', body })
SignupRouter → EventService: emit('puter.signup', event) → check event.allow
SignupRouter [if is_temp && cookie present] → AuthService: check_session(cookie_token) → return existing user
SignupRouter → SignupRouter: validate username, email, password (regex, length, reserved words)
SignupRouter → CleanEmailService: clean(email), validate(clean_email)
SignupRouter → Database: SELECT EXISTS ... WHERE email/clean_email AND email_confirmed=1 (duplicate check)
SignupRouter → Database: SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=? AND password IS NULL (pseudo-user lookup)
SignupRouter [if no pseudo_user] → Database: INSERT INTO user (username, email, clean_email, password=bcrypt, uuid, email_confirm_code, email_confirm_token, free_storage, ...)
SignupRouter → Database: UPDATE user SET last_activity_ts=now() WHERE id=?
SignupRouter → GroupService: add_users({ uid: default_user_group | default_temp_group, users: [username] })
SignupRouter → EventService: emit('puter.signup.success', { user_id, user_uuid, email, username })
SignupRouter [if pseudo_user] → Database: UPDATE user SET username, password, uuid, email_confirm_code, email_confirm_token, requires_email_confirmation=1 WHERE id=pseudo_user.id
SignupRouter [if pseudo_user] → GroupService: remove_users(default_temp_group), add_users(default_user_group)
SignupRouter → Database: SELECT * FROM user WHERE id=? (fetch created user)
SignupRouter → AuthService: create_session_token(user, { req })
AuthService → AuthService: create_session_(user, meta) — extracts IP, user-agent, host from req
AuthService → SessionService: create_session(user, meta)
SessionService → Database: INSERT INTO sessions (uuid, user_id, meta, last_activity, created_at)
SessionService → Redis: SET session-cache:{uuid} (TTL 300s), SADD user-sessions:{user_id}
SessionService → AuthService: return session { uuid, user_uid, user_id, meta }
AuthService → TokenService: sign('auth', { type:'session', uuid, user_uid }) → session_token (JWT)
AuthService → SignupRouter: return { session, token: session_token }
SignupRouter → AuthService: create_gui_token(user, session)
AuthService → TokenService: sign('auth', { type:'gui', uuid:session.uuid, user_uid }) → gui_token
AuthService → SignupRouter: return gui_token

SignupRouter [if email_confirmation_required OR requires_email_confirmation] → EmailService: send_email_verification_code(email_confirm_code, email) OR send_email_verification_token(email_confirm_token, email, user_uuid)
SignupRouter → ReferralCodeService: gen_referral_code(user) [optional service]
SignupRouter → UserService: generate_default_fsentries({ user })
SignupRouter → EventService: emit('user.save_account', { user }) [if not temp]

SignupRouter → Client: Set-Cookie: session_token (HttpOnly), return { token: gui_token, user: { username, uuid, email, email_confirmed, requires_email_confirmation, is_temp, taskbar_items, referral_code } }

signup_create_new_user_oidc.purpose: OIDC-based new user creation; form-signup path not yet implemented here
flow: Validate providerId + userinfo (returns null if missing)
Get database, group, user, oidc services
Sanitize username from claims.name or claims.email; generate_identifier() fallback
Check duplicate clean_email → return null if exists
INSERT INTO user (username, email, clean_email, password=null, uuid, email_confirm_code, email_confirm_token, free_storage, email_confirmed=1, requires_email_confirmation=0)
SELECT id FROM user WHERE uuid=?
SELECT * FROM user WHERE id=? (fetch full user, parse metadata)
signup_create_new_user_oidc.note: OIDC path sets email_confirmed=1 and requires_email_confirmation=0 — no email verification email sent

session_service_key_methods.create_session: async create_session(user, meta) → INSERT sessions + Redis cache → return session object
session_service_key_methods.getSession: async getSession(uuid) → Redis cache → DB fallback → update last_touch → return cleaned session
session_service_key_methods.cacheSession: async cacheSession(session, { flushState }) → Redis SET with 300s TTL + SADD user-sessions set
session_service_key_methods.invalidateCachedSession: async invalidateCachedSession(uuid, userId) → Redis DEL + SREM
session_service_key_methods.remove_session: async remove_session(uuid) → invalidate cache + DELETE FROM sessions WHERE uuid=?
session_service_key_methods.get_user_sessions: async get_user_sessions(user) → Redis SMEMBERS user-sessions:{id} → getCachedSession each

auth_service_key_methods.create_session_token: async create_session_token(user, meta) → create_session_(user, meta) → tokenService.sign('auth', {type:'session', uuid, user_uid}) → return { session, token }
auth_service_key_methods.create_gui_token: create_gui_token(user, session) → tokenService.sign('auth', {type:'gui', uuid:session.uuid, user_uid}) → return JWT
auth_service_key_methods.check_session: async check_session(cur_token, meta) → tokenService.verify → sessionService.getSession → return { user, token: gui_token }

key_conditions: is_temp=true → skip email/password validation, generate random username & dummy email, no email confirmation
is_temp=false AND (email_confirmation_required OR requires_email_confirmation) → send email verification
pseudo_user exists → UPDATE existing user record instead of INSERT
OIDC path (signup_create_new_user.js) → auto-confirmed, no email sent
important_notes: Two signup paths: (1) POST /signup in signup.js for form/temp users — full validation, conditional email confirmation; (2) signup_create_new_user.js for OIDC users — auto-confirmed. Session tokens are JWT (HTTP-only cookie), GUI tokens are separate JWT for client-side use. SessionService uses Redis as primary cache with DB flush loop (5–60s random interval). Email codes are 6-digit; email tokens are UUID-based links.
